markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Okta and growthx.ai for outbound/growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rachael (Okta) seeks to build an internal growth lab, focusing on fundamentals and testing before scaling to SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [growthx.ai can provide custom workflows and content support without direct integration into Okta's systems](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Two separate SOWs will be created: one for editorial/content refresh, another for custom growth/outbound workflows](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Collaboration will focus on hand-crafted, expert-led processes rather than fully autonomous AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

## Topics

### Okta's Internal Growth Strategy

  - [Rachael is building an internal growth lab and engine at Okta](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Focus on testing and data-driven approaches before scaling to SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Aim to improve ROI on current activities (e.g., direct mail campaigns)](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Emphasis on mastering fundamentals and basics that are currently overlooked](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### growthx.ai's Offering and Approach

  - [Provides custom workflows and content support without direct CRM integration](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Offers expert-led, hand-crafted processes rather than fully autonomous AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Utilizes robust infrastructure processing hundreds of millions of tokens daily](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Can create specialized workflows for research, outbound, and other go-to-market processes](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

### Use Case Examples

  - [Identifying enterprise companies building AI agents (e.g., Auth4GenAI tool)](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Developing targeted outreach based on company announcements and AI initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Creating workflows for B2B SaaS value propositions across different market segments](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Collaboration Structure

  - [Two separate SOWs to be created:](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
    1.  Editorial and content refresh
    2.  Custom workflows for growth and outbound processes
  - [Focus on building and iterating on valuable use cases without usage-based charging](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)

### Security and Integration Concerns

  - [Okta, as a public company in identity security, has strict AI tool usage policies](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [growthx.ai's solution will remain standalone, without integration into Okta's existing infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Data retention and processing handled carefully to maintain compliance](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel and Kyle to create and send two separate SOWs by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Rachael to review current SOW and new custom workflow proposal](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Rachael to share Q2 plans to help inform the custom workflow SOW](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Rachael to follow up with other Okta team leaders regarding the content-focused SOW](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion after Okta's QBR period (in about two weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/B3zZjjHxUn2TcMQCshaGwDtnTVq5y2yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
